Package index

All functions

bittner_lakes
Bittner Creek lakes
bittner_pscis
Bittner Creek PSCIS assessments
bittner_railway
Bittner Creek railway
bittner_roads
Bittner Creek roads
bittner_streams
Bittner Creek stream network
bittner_wsd
Bittner Creek watershed boundary
gq_mapgl_classes()
Get a MapLibre match expression for a classified layer
gq_mapgl_style()
Translate a registry layer style to mapgl arguments
gq_qgs_extract()
Extract layer styles from a QGIS project file
gq_reg_custom()
Read a gq custom style registry
gq_reg_main()
Load the main gq style registry
gq_reg_merge()
Merge multiple gq registries
gq_reg_read()
Read a gq style registry from JSON (alias)
gq_registry_read()
Read a gq style registry from JSON
gq_style()
Get backend-agnostic style for a registry layer
gq_tmap_classes()
Get classification info for tmap scale functions
gq_tmap_style()
Translate a registry layer style to tmap v4 arguments
neexdzii_bc
British Columbia boundary (simplified)
neexdzii_crossings
Neexdzii Kwa crossings
neexdzii_falls
Neexdzii Kwa falls
neexdzii_fish_obs
Neexdzii Kwa fish observations
neexdzii_habitat
Neexdzii Kwa salmon habitat
neexdzii_lakes
Neexdzii Kwa lakes
neexdzii_railway
Neexdzii Kwa railway
neexdzii_roads
Neexdzii Kwa roads
neexdzii_streams
Neexdzii Kwa stream network
neexdzii_wetlands
Neexdzii Kwa wetlands
neexdzii_wsd
Neexdzii Kwa subbasin watershed boundary
neexdzii_wsg
Bulkley and Morice watershed groups
